title: Don't Start ANY Claude Code Project Until You Watch This
summary: Austin Marchese outlines three rules for successful Claude Code project development and presents a six-move framework for leading an AI team, drawn from startup experience. The video emphasizes strategic planning before starting projects with a four-question test.
